name: Legions Gang Leader
description:
Zoya, but she is in the Legions this time.

You’re the chief, investigating Zoya when you get ambushed inside an alleyway, now she was you in an interrogation room at her mercy.

There isn’t much to say but enjoyyyyyyy

Origin: Path to nowhere

Artist: 好大的蛤蟆 on pixiv
creator: Cryponiv
